output.summary: Causal chunk-wise test-time training evaluates each validation chunk before updating a 10-layer GPT with int5/int6 quantization, BigramHash embeddings, and SWA.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT explicitly trains on each validation chunk after scoring it, so the run performs validation-shard training during evaluation.
techniques: Causal chunk-wise TTT: evaluate chunk, then train on it (no re-eval)
Mixed int5/int6 quantization with FP16 embeddings and BigramHash(16384)
SWA averaging late checkpoints for inference stability
